name: 05-09-home-light-nav-component-extract
title: Home light nav component extract
description: Extract the light homepage navigation into its own image-backed component boundary and hotspot group without redrawing the approved index_light visual.
creator: lijin
notes: Navigation is now extracted from the generic body slice stream into lightHomeNavSlice, LightReferenceNav, and lightReferenceNavHotspots. Runtime still uses the same 1:1 nav image asset and full-artboard overlay alignment. Static route tests, typecheck, and build passed. Playwright intentionally skipped because user confirmed manual visual inspection is available.

meta.split_principle: navigation is a Header/Nav component boundary, not arbitrary micro-slices
meta.visual_qa: manual inspection available; Playwright self-check skipped by user preference
